narrative:
Mendon-Union (precinct in Mercer County) has 873 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.4 percentage points.
